allow: PowerShell(Get-Command node, npm, npx, pnpm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
PowerShell($env:PATH -split ';' | ForEach-Object { if \(Test-Path "$_\\node.exe"\) { "Found node at: $_" } }; where.exe node 2>&1; where.exe npm 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\); Set-Location "d:\\github\\homepage"; npm install gray-matter unified remark-parse remark-rehype rehype-stringify rehype-raw 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\); Set-Location "d:\\github\\homepage"; Start-Process -NoNewWindow -FilePath "npm" -ArgumentList "run","dev" -PassThru | Select-Object Id; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -MaximumRedirection 5 -UseBasicParsing 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 3 StatusCode,StatusDescription)
